text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of quiet anticipation in the spacious, modern room. The bean bags and relaxed setting invite contemplation or conversation, making me feel at ease yet alert to possibilities.

In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and thought-provoking displays, I am inspired. The prominence of R+D (research and development) on the wall stirs my curiosity and sense of wonder about humanity’s pursuit of knowledge and innovation. I feel energized, eager to explore and reflect.
